mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.project_name, t0.project_id, t0.collection_amount, t0.collection_date, t0.collection_sign, t0.collection_ascription, t0.collection_type, t0.is_collection_historical, t0.collection_summary, t0.is_deleted, t0.remarks, t0.compensatory_cash, t0.default_cash, t0.interest, t0.other_fee, t0.lawyer_name, t0.lawyer_id, t0.flow_state, t0.collection_status
